dimensional gridded dataset (ie: 4 dimensions: lon-lat,depth,time)

 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document contains the Product User Manual for the Copernicus Marine Ocean 
Monitoring Indicator (OMI) ARCTIC_OMI_SI_extent_obs. The data are monthly averaged Sea 
Ice Extent (SIE) time series. 
The OMI product is a reformatting of the Northern Hemisphere monthly SIEs from the Sea 
Ice Index (OSI-420) product from the EUMETSAT Ocean and

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for the Copernicus Marine Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) ARCTIC_OMI_SI_extent_obs, which provides monthly averaged Sea Ice Extent time series data.
